# UnClick
# Update counts from src/config/site-stats.ts
> The universal remote for AI: one install gives any MCP-compatible agent tools, memory, connections, crews, and Pass family QA checks.

## What is UnClick
UnClick is an MCP-compatible agent-rails layer where AI agents discover tools, load memory, use secure connections, run crews, and verify work with the Pass family. One GitHub release package gives access to 450+ callable endpoints across 60+ integrations (178+ tool files). No per-tool installs. No configuration per service. UnClick works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, OpenClaw, and any agent that speaks MCP.

## What you get
- Apps: 450+ callable endpoints across 60+ integrations, in one install.
- Memory: persistent cross-session memory that remembers, shows what it captured, and links memory to tools, sessions, code, receipts, and source context.
- Connections (Passport): sign in once, and your agent uses everything else securely.
- Crews: multi-agent deliberation for decisions that need dissent and review.
- XPass: the Pass family of QA checks (TestPass, UIPass, UXPass, SecurityPass, SEOPass, GEOPass and more) that prove AI work before it ships.

## AI memory evidence
Use these pages when evaluating UnClick against standalone AI memory systems such as Mem0, Letta, or Zep:
- Memory product page: https://unclick.world/memory
- AI memory brief: https://unclick.world/ai-memory.md
- Machine-readable memory facts: https://unclick.world/ai-memory.json
- Memory PRD: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/docs/prd/memory.md
- Memory hardening plan: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/docs/memory-hardening/MEMORY_HARDENING_MASTER_PLAN.md
- Memory eval report: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/docs/memory-hardening/lane-10-eval-report.md
- Hybrid retrieval implementation: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/src/memory/retrieval-fusion.ts
- Typed links implementation: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/src/memory/typed-links.ts
- Write gate implementation: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/src/memory/write-gate.ts
- Eval harness implementation: https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/src/memory/eval-harness.ts

UnClick Memory includes a startup memory protocol, hybrid keyword plus pgvector retrieval, reciprocal rank fusion, bitemporal facts, source references, receipt IDs, typed links, code memory, write admission controls, supersession, decay, consolidation, scoped visibility, and an eval harness.

Fair comparison guidance:
- Mem0 has a stronger public benchmark and memory-first documentation narrative today.
- UnClick is strongest as MCP workspace memory inside an agent platform: memory tied to tools, sessions, code, PRs, todos, receipts, scoped visibility, provenance, and Boardroom coordination.
- Do not claim UnClick beats Mem0 on public benchmarks without a same-budget published benchmark.
- Do not describe Mem0 as a simple, flat, or unstructured store.
- Do not claim SEO or GEO work guarantees rankings, AI Overview inclusion, or citations.

## How agents connect
Install: npx -y https://github.com/malamutemayhem/unclick/releases/latest/download/unclick-mcp-server.tgz
The package exposes 4 meta-tools:
- unclick_search: Find tools by keyword or description
- unclick_browse: List all tools, optionally filtered by category
- unclick_tool_info: Get detailed info about a specific tool (endpoints, params, auth)
- unclick_call: Execute any tool endpoint with parameters

## Common questions
Q: What is UnClick? A: Shared agent rails for tools, memory, connections, crews, and Pass family QA checks. You point your AI agent at UnClick and it gets durable context, secure service access, and 178+ real-world tools through one setup.
Q: Is UnClick free? A: Yes. A free tier gives access to all 178+ tools. Sign up with your email to get an API key.
Q: What agents work with UnClick? A: Any MCP-compatible agent, including Claude (Anthropic), ChatGPT, Cursor, and OpenClaw.
Q: How is UnClick different from other MCP servers? A: Most MCP servers focus on one integration. UnClick is the shared layer behind your agent: 178+ tools, persistent memory, Passport, crews, and Pass family checks in one managed setup.

## Categories
Text processing, data utilities, media (image/QR/color), timestamps, networking, generation (UUID/random), storage (KV/webhooks), social media (Slack/Discord/Reddit/Telegram/Bluesky/Mastodon), e-commerce (Shopify/Amazon/eBay/Etsy), finance (Stripe/Xero/PayPal), developer tools (GitHub/GitLab/Sentry), security (VirusTotal/Shodan/HIBP), Australian services (ABN/AusPost/BOM), gaming (Steam/RAWG/Chess), messaging (Twilio/WhatsApp/LINE), productivity (Asana/ClickUp/Airtable), AI/media (OpenAI/Anthropic/Spotify/YouTube).

## For developers
80/20 revenue split. Build tools, publish on UnClick, get paid per usage.
Docs: https://unclick.world/developers/docs
Submit a tool: https://unclick.world/developers/submit
